sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66504" key="mesotagh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσο-τᾰγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n66504.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">placed in the middle</tr_>, [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀριθμοί</foreign>] lamb.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">in Nic.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.84</biblScope> </bibl> P.</sense> </entryFree>
